title: valeriana officinalis var. sambucifolia
intro: Valeriana officinalis var. sambucifolia, also known as the elder-leaved valerian, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the Valerianaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural sedative, antispasmodic, and anxiolytic agent, attributed to its valerenic acid content. The elder-leaved valerian offers several health benefits, such as promoting relaxation, reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects and provide a more balanced approach to health and wellness.
